notes:
## What's new in v0.9.3

### Desktop client
- **Transfer flow fix**: Keychain secrets now transfer **before** the vector rebuild, so first-time remote switches no longer silently produce an empty search index. The rebuild itself is now driven from the client so errors surface in the UI instead of being swallowed server-side.
- **Progress UI for vector rebuild**: You now see per-table progress (items processed, failed count, elapsed time) during the ~15 minute rebuild instead of a blank screen.
- **Richer tray menu**: When "Show Dock Icon" is disabled, the system tray is now the primary menu. Added About Keen, Check for Updates…, and a Settings… submenu (General / Appearance / AI Assistant / Core Facts / Keyboard Shortcuts / Integrations / Workflows). Left-click still shows/hides Keen; right-click opens the menu.

### Backend (v0.9.4)
- `/api/transfer` no longer performs the vector rebuild inline — the client drives it after keychain transfer.
- `vectorRebuildService` emits progress every 10 items or 500ms (whichever comes first) plus at the start of every non-empty table, so the client UI gets smooth real-time updates.
